title: Cataclysm - Ametyst crab temple
description: I present to your attention an add-on for the Cataclysm mod, which adds its own structure for the amethyst crab to the game.
body:
Cataclysm mod adds 7 new bosses to the game.

Everyone has their own dungeon.

But they didn't build their own dungeon for the amethyst crab.

My addition will correct this misunderstanding.

Now the amethyst crab will have its own small temple, which will be generated in the lush caves biome.

This is the first version of the mod, in the future the structure will be improved and various variations will be added.

to find the location of the structure, I recommend installing the mod [https://modrinth.com/mod/explorers-compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/explorers-compass)

The L_Ender's Cataclysm mod must be installed, otherwise the structure will appear without amethyst crabs.[https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm/version/2.64](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm/version/2.64)

You can add my add-on to your mod pack.
